title: senecio pterocarpus
intro: Senecio pterocarpus, also known as Buttercup Ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio pterocarpus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
